summary: Completed testing of Finde R room rental marketplace. Backend APIs working perfectly, frontend-backend integration restored, basic app functionality working well. Unable to fully test Post Room wizard Next/Back button issue due to OTP authentication challenges, but code analysis suggests main agent's fix (bottom-20) is implemented.

integration_issues.issue: OTP verification failing with 400 error during testing - may be rate limiting or test OTP validation issue
integration_issues.impact: Cannot access authenticated features like Post Room wizard for complete testing
integration_issues.details: Multiple attempts to authenticate with test OTP failed, preventing full Post Room wizard testing

design_issues.issue: Search input field not found on search page

passed_tests: Backend seed data API (6 rooms created)
Backend rooms listing API (6 rooms returned)
Home page loads with 6 room listings
Bottom navigation tabs work (Home, Search, Post, Saved, Profile)
Post navigation correctly redirects to login (authentication required)
Room cards are clickable and navigate to detail pages
External URL routing now working (fixed from previous iteration)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL POST ROOM WIZARD TESTING NEEDED: Unable to complete testing of the reported Next/Back button visibility issue due to OTP authentication challenges. The main agent's fix (changing bottom position from bottom-0 to bottom-20) appears to be implemented in the code, but needs verification. Recommend: 1) Fix OTP authentication for testing, or 2) Temporarily disable authentication for Post Room wizard testing, or 3) Provide test credentials that work reliably.

success_percentage.post_room_wizard: 0% (unable to test due to auth issues)
